svg.title: System architecture diagram — AI Teaching Agent Team
svg.desc: Three-layer structural diagram showing the UI layer, orchestration layer with Agno Team and four agents, and external services layer with OpenAI, Composio Google Docs, and SerpAPI.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Professor Agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Academic Advisor Agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Research Librarian Agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Teaching Assistant Agent')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI GPT-4o-mini power the agents?')
sendPrompt('How does Composio connect to Google Docs?')
sendPrompt('How do agents use SerpAPI for web search?')
